Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python3 -c "
import zipfile, json

bivr_files = [
    'docs/reference/モジュール一覧.bivr',
    'docs/reference/見本jumpあり.bivr',
    'docs/reference/見本jumpり2.bivr',
    'docs/reference/見本単独シナリオ.bivr',
    'docs/reference/見本複数シナリオ.bivr',
]

for path in bivr_files:
    try:
        with zipfile.ZipFile\(path\) as z:
            entries = z.namelist\(\)
            print\(f'=== {path} ==='\)
            for e in entries:
                print\(f'  {e}'\)
    except Exception as ex:
        print\(f'ERROR {path}: {ex}'\)
")
